title: AI Services Sales Playbook
subtitle: Field Manual — Cold Calls, Walk-Ins & War Room Tools
author: William Marceau | Marceau Solutions
content_markdown:
## YOUR WAR ROOM — OPEN THESE BEFORE EVERY CALL BLOCK

| Tool | URL | What It Does |
|------|-----|--------------|
| **Pipeline** | pipeline.marceausolutions.com | T1 call queue, pre-call intel, log every outcome |
| **Call Coach** | calls.marceausolutions.com | Paste transcript after each call, get scored + coached |
| **Signing Portal** | sign.marceausolutions.com | Client-facing agreement page (auto-sent with proposal) |

### Call Blitz Workflow — Do This Every Time

1. Open pipeline → 25 Tier 1 deals are your call list
2. Tap a deal → hit the Google button → find their number (5 seconds)
3. Read the pre-call intel — industry, pain point, email template used
4. Dial — reference the email if they got one
5. Log the outcome immediately — call logger is right on the deal page
6. After the call — open Notes → Call Recordings → copy transcript → paste into calls.marceausolutions.com → get scored
7. Repeat

---

## 1. THE OFFER

### Pricing Tiers

| Tier | Name | Monthly | Best For |
|------|------|---------|----------|
| **T1** | Starter | $497/mo | 1–10 employee service business, single location |
| **T2** | Growth | $997/mo | Higher volume, multi-location, full automation stack |
| **T3** | Pro | $1,497/mo | Medical/dental/professional with complex workflows |
| **T4** | Elite | $2,497/mo | Multi-location, full AI front-office build-out |

**Default pitch: T1 Starter at $497/mo. Free 2-week onboarding. One recovered job pays the month.**

### The Offer in One Sentence

"I build AI systems that make sure no call, form, or inquiry ever goes unanswered — 24/7, no staff needed, results in 2 weeks or you pay nothing."

### What T1 Starter Includes

- Missed Call Text-Back (10-second auto-response)
- AI receptionist (answers FAQs, books appointments)
- Lead follow-up sequences (multi-touch, 30 days)
- Monthly performance dashboard
- Free 2-week onboarding, white-glove setup

### The Math — Use This Every Time

Average service job: $300–$800. Miss 5 calls/week = $6,000–$16,000/month going to whoever answers first. Monthly cost: $497. **ROI: 12–32x. One recovered call pays the month.**

---

## 2. TARGET MARKET

### Your T1 Call List (25 Businesses)

These are your highest-priority targets — already scored and queued in the pipeline:
- HVAC / Home Services
- Electrical contractors
- Plumbing / Roofing / Pool service
- Dental practices / Physical therapy / Veterinary
- Real estate agencies

### The Ideal Profile

- Owner-operated, 1–15 employees
- Gets inbound calls from strangers (not just referrals/bids)
- Has a website, no visible chat widget
- Google reviews mentioning "never called back" = gold

### Skip These

- Pure referral/bid businesses
- Franchises (can't make tech decisions locally)
- B2B with long sales cycles

---

## 3. THE CALL SCRIPT

### Cold Call Opening

"Hi, is this [First Name]? ... Hey [First Name], this is William from Marceau Solutions — I sent you a quick email last week, not sure if you caught it. I work with [industry] businesses in Naples on a pretty simple fix for missed calls. Got 2 minutes?"

### If They Got Your Email

"Hey [First Name], William Marceau — I sent you an email about helping [Company] with missed call follow-up. Did you get a chance to look at it?"

- Yes → "Great — any questions, or should I just walk you through how it works in 2 minutes?"
- No → "No worries. Quick version: when you miss a call, the customer gets a text back within 10 seconds from your business."

### Pain Discovery (5 min)

- "How do most of your customers find you?"
- "What happens when you miss a call — especially after hours?"
- "Who's answering the phone when you're out on a job?"
- "What do you think a missed call costs you on average?"

*Listen. Don't sell yet. Mirror their language back.*

### Agitate (2 min)

"So if you're missing even 3–4 calls a week, and your average job is $400–500... that's $6,000–$8,000 a month walking straight to whoever answers their phone first. Not because your work is worse — just because you were busy."

### Solution (2 min)

"What I've built texts every missed caller back within 10 seconds — 'Hey, sorry we missed you, how can we help?' — while you're still on the job. Customer replies, you see it on your phone, lead saved. We also set up an AI layer that can answer common questions and book appointments automatically."

### The Close (2 min)

"Free 2-week onboarding — I build the whole system, you see real data. If it's working, $497 a month to keep it running. If not, I turn it off. Zero risk on your end. Want me to get that set up this week?"

### Warm Transition

"Perfect. 15-minute call so I can get your setup info — I can do Thursday morning or Friday afternoon, which works better?"
→ calendly.com/wmarceau/ai-services-discovery

---

## 4. OBJECTION HANDLING

### "We're doing fine"
"When was the last time you counted how many calls went to voicemail? Industry average is 30% go unanswered. I can show you how to check in 2 minutes."

### "That sounds expensive"
"$497 a month. One recovered call — one HVAC job, one dental appointment — and it's paid for. And the first 2 weeks are free. I prove it works before you pay anything."

### "We already have voicemail"
"How many voicemails get returned within an hour? This texts them back in 10 seconds while you're still on the job. They reply instead of calling the next person on Google."

### "I need to think about it"
"Totally fair. The trial is free — no card required. Want me to just set it up so you can see real numbers? Either it works or it doesn't."

### "I don't trust AI"
"Completely understand. This isn't a robot answering your phone — it's a text message from your own business. 89% of customers prefer texting over leaving voicemails anyway."

### "Need to talk to my partner"
"Makes sense. Want me to email a one-pager with the numbers so you can show them? I can send it in 5 minutes — what's the best email?"

---

## 5. WALK-IN SCRIPT

### The 30-Second Door Approach

"Hi — is the owner in? ... Hey, I'm William from Marceau Solutions. I work with local businesses on AI systems for missed calls. Takes 2 minutes to show you — worth a quick look?"

### If They're Busy

"No worries — I'll leave this with you." *(Leave the PDF.)* "My number's on there. If you ever wonder what it'd do for your business, I'll show you in 15 minutes."

### The Phone Demo

Call their business number right there. Let it ring to voicemail. Say: "That's what your customers experience now. Here's what they experience with the system." Show the auto-text on your phone.

### After the Walk-In

Log it in the pipeline immediately: In-Person Visit → reaction → notes. The visit logger is on the deal page.

---

## 6. LOGGING OUTCOMES IN THE PIPELINE

**Every interaction gets logged. No exceptions. This is your training data.**

### Call Outcomes

| Outcome | Auto-Action |
|---------|-------------|
| Answered - Interested | Deal → Qualified |
| Answered - Callback | Next action set |
| Voicemail Left | Logged |
| No Answer | Logged |
| Not Interested | Logged |

### After a Qualified Conversation

1. Mark deal as Qualified in pipeline
2. Click "Send Proposal" on deal page
3. Proposal PDF + agreement auto-sent to their email
4. Client signs at sign.marceausolutions.com
5. You get Telegram alert when they sign

---

## 7. USING CALL COACH

**URL: calls.marceausolutions.com**

After every call:
1. iOS 18: Notes → Call Recordings → copy transcript
2. Paste into calls.marceausolutions.com → enter business name → Score
3. Review 6 dimension scores + 3 coaching points
4. Focus your next call on your lowest-scoring dimension

| Dimension | What It Measures |
|-----------|------------------|
| Rapport | Did you connect before selling? |
| Pain Discovery | Did you find the real pain? |
| Value | Did you connect solution to their pain? |
| Objections | Did you resolve pushback cleanly? |
| Tonality | Did you sound confident, not desperate? |
| Close | Did you ask for the business? |

**Target: 7.0+ overall after 10 calls. Every call should match or beat the last.**

---

## 8. PROPOSAL & SIGNING FLOW

1. Prospect says yes → open their deal in pipeline
2. Click "Send Proposal & Agreement" → select T1 ($497/mo)
3. System auto-generates branded PDF + agreement → sends to client email
4. Client clicks "Review & Sign" → sign.marceausolutions.com
5. Client types name + signs → you get Telegram notification
6. Deal auto-advances to "Proposal Sent"

**Fully automated. You don't manage any of this manually.**

---

## 9. KEY STATS FOR CONVERSATION

- "30% of inbound calls go unanswered" — service business average
- "89% of consumers prefer texting over leaving voicemails"
- "Responding within 5 minutes is 100x more likely to convert than waiting 30 minutes"
- "78% of customers buy from the first business that responds"
- "Most sales happen after 5–7 touches. Most businesses give up after 1."

## 11. DAILY CALL BLITZ CHECKLIST

**Before you start:**
- [ ] pipeline.marceausolutions.com open
- [ ] calls.marceausolutions.com open
- [ ] iOS call recording on (Settings → Phone → Record Calls)
- [ ] Leave-behind PDF on your phone

**Each call:**
- [ ] Read pre-call intel before dialing
- [ ] 2–3 pain questions before pitching
- [ ] End with a specific next step
- [ ] Log outcome immediately after hanging up

**After each call block:**
- [ ] Paste transcripts into Call Coach
- [ ] Review scores — what's your lowest dimension?
- [ ] Adjust approach for next round

**End of day:**
- [ ] Check pipeline for email replies
- [ ] Report to Panacea: calls made / interested / voicemails / next steps
